mapper.sql: attempt_id, user_id, subject_id, total_count, correct_count, result_level_code, status, submitted_at, created_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM level_test_attempts ORDER BY submitted_at DESC, attempt_id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO level_test_attempts (user_id, subject_id, total_count, correct_count, result_level_code, status, submitted_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{subjectId}, #{totalCount}, #{correctCount}, #{resultLevelCode}, #{status}, #{submittedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE level_test_attempts SET user_id = #{userId}, subject_id = #{subjectId}, total_count = #{totalCount}, correct_count = #{correctCount}, result_level_code = #{resultLevelCode}, status = #{status}, submitted_at = #{submittedAt} WHERE attempt_id = #{attemptId}
